title: Solicitation and Acceptance of Sponsored Projects and Gifts Policy
display_label: Solicitation and Acceptance of Sponsored Projects and Gifts
content: Distinguishes sponsored projects (grants, contracts, cooperative agreements) from gifts and establishes university procedures for soliciting, reviewing, accepting, and routing each type of external funding. Defines the respective roles of the Office of Research Administration and the Office of Institutional Advancement. Compiled in PI Handbook 5 (effective 2024-07-01). Full policy details in PI Handbook 5.
